MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Byron Clayton Thompson, Esq. represented Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority. No appearance by Defendant, Martha C. Calderon. The Court orders the request for jury trial stricken, and off the settlement conference. The trial date is confirmed.
